id: 20260712-150737-将模型选择下拉窗改为按提供商分栏的弹窗选择器
title: 将模型选择下拉窗改为按提供商分栏的弹窗选择器

requestAffinity.note: Studio SDK child runs use the same Pi SDK/provider/auth/model-registry path as the parent chat, but provider request affinity is keyed by the independent child session id rather than reusing the parent session id.

subagents.prompt: 请先阅读 AGENTS.md 及与前端、模型选择、现有弹窗/检索相关的文档和代码。完成该任务的需求澄清、现状分析、PRD、技术设计、实施计划和检查方案；确认这是 UI 改动后，按门禁派发 ui-designer 生成基于现有项目的 HTML 原型。请更新 Studio 任务 artifacts，并在方案完成后汇报需要用户审批的原型与计划。不要直接实现生产代码。
subagents.summary: 已完成架构规划并更新 Studio artifacts： - `brief.md`：现状分析、目标、推荐范围、待决策项 - `prd.md`：需求范围与验收标准 - `ui.md`：UI 门禁、ui-designer 派发说明、HTML 原型要求 - `design.md`：组件边界、数据流、兼容性、焦点与滚动风险 - `implement.md`：5 个子任务的 DAG，以及可解析的 `ypi-implementation-plan` - `checks.md`：静态检查与桌面、移动、键盘、Settings 回归方案 - `plan-review.md`：用户审批入口 - `handoff.md`、`summary.md`：交接与当前状态 关键方案是保留共享 `ModelSelect` 的 props、搜索能力和 `provider/modelId` 契约，仅将锚定下拉改为 viewport 模态。推荐桌面按 provider 并列分栏，窄屏改为单列分组；Settings 的“模型策略”作为独立首栏。 验证方面，机器计划 JSON 已成功解析，共 `UI-01`、`IMP-01`、`IMP-02`、`CHK-01`、`REV-01` 五项。未修改生产代码，因此未运行 lint/typecheck。 当前阻塞：本子会话没有 Studio 派发工具，无法实际派发 `ui-designer`，所以 `model-selector-prototype.html` 尚未生成。主会话需要先按 `ui.md` 派发 UI 设计员，再请用户审批 HTML 原型和 `plan-review.md`。用户还需确认采用“provider 并列列”还是“左侧 provider 导航 + 右侧模型列表”。在原型获批前不得进入实现。

progress.lastTextPreview:
已完成架构规划并更新 Studio artifacts：

- `brief.md`：现状分析、目标、推荐范围、待决策项
- `prd.md`：需求范围与验收标准
- `ui.md`：UI 门禁、ui-designer 派发说明、HTML 原型要求
- `design.md`：组件边界、数据流、兼容性、焦点与滚动风险
- `implement.md`：5 个子任务的 DAG，以及可解析的 `ypi-implementation-plan`
- `checks.md`：静态检查与桌面、移动、键盘、Settings 回归方案
- `plan-review.md`：用户审批入口
- `handoff.md`、`summary.md`：交接与当前状态

关键方案是保留共享 `ModelSelect` 的 props、搜索能力和 `provider/modelId` 契约，仅将锚定下拉改为 viewport 模态。推荐桌面按 provider 并列分栏，窄屏改为单列分组；Settings 的“模型策略”作为独立首栏。

验证方面，机器计划 JSON 已成功解析，共 `UI-01`、`IMP-01`、`IMP-02`、`CHK-01`、`REV-01` 五项。未修改生产代码，因此未运行 lint/typecheck。

当前阻塞：本子会话没有 Studio 派发工具，无法实际派发 `ui-designer`，所以 `model-selector-prototype.html` 尚未生成。主会话需要先按 `ui.md` 派发 UI 设计员，再请用户审批 HTML 原型和 `plan-review.md`。用户还需确认采用“provider 并列列”还是“左侧 provider 导航 + 右侧模型列表”。在原型获批前不得进入实现。

itemsPreview.text:
# Frontend Module Map

## Components

| File | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `components/AppShell.tsx` | Top-level layout, URL state, active Project Registry space context, browser tab title that prefers `Project(Space)` when project/space ids match (falling back to normalized workspace path and then cwd/Git title), tab management, Web Terminal bottom-dock toggling, resizable left drawer, right drawer mode switching between files and optional Trellis/Studio tasks, Trellis-task-to-chat context block insertion, session-scoped Studio widget polling that stays fast while implementation subtasks are running/waiting/need attention, debounced Studio tool-driven session-list refresh so newly-created child audit sessions and wait/status changes appear in the sidebar without global polling, and compact top-bar usage chips that render the confirmed display口径 — a `parent` session shows the parent rollup total and appends `incl. Studio` only when Studio children have real usage (child token total or child cost > 0, not merely child count > 0), a `standalone` session shows its own usage with no child marker, and a `studio_child` audit session shows only that child's own usage (`selectedSessionTotals`) with a `Studio child` mark and must not show a bare `+child` or parent-rollup placeholder; the tooltip splits own/Studio-children cost for parent sessions and can include the parent rollup total plus parent id for child audit sessions. Handles right panel desktop width resizing (persisted to localStorage, clamped on viewport resize), preview panel FileExplorer vertical resize with corrected drag direction (down=more explorer height), and active-space switch detection via `spaceContextMatchesSession`. Studio task state migrated from single `studioSessionTask` to multi-task `YpiStudioSessionTasksLinkResult` with derived `studioSessionTasks`/`studioBoundTaskKeys`/`studioPrimaryTaskKey`, aggregate active-run counting across all bound tasks, and per-bound-task needs-attention polling acceleration. |
| `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` | Project Registry-driven project/space tree sidebar. It loads projects from `/api/projects` instead of synthesizing them from sessions, lazy-loads linked sessions for the selected project space, hides YPI Studio child audit sessions from ordinary root history by default while showing them as nested Studio audit rows under visible parents, shows exact-cwd legacy unassigned sessions separately, keeps WorkTree actions available for worktree spaces, and includes archive/unarchive actions plus the integrated file explorer with a resizable session/explorer split. **Project/space selection** has been replaced from an inline dropdown to a compact top switch button (`选择项目空间` when empty, or `ProjectName / SpaceName` when selected). Clicking the button opens `ProjectSpaceSwitchDialog` for layered (left project list → right space list) browsing, search, and add-project flows inside a viewport-level modal dialog. The `SessionSidebar` owns all project/space state and callbacks (registration from manual path, OS directory picker, Git clone, default directory) and passes them into the dialog as props; the dialog is purely a UI shell that calls back to the sidebar's existing `upsertProjectAndSelectMainSpace()`, `handleDirectoryPicker()`, `commitCustomPath()`, `handleGitCloneSubmit()`, etc. The sidebar header displays current project name / space subtitle / WorkTree badge; WorkTree archive/delete remains available by right-clicking the selected switch button or a WorkTree row inside the dialog. Add-project forms (manual path, Git clone) are rendered inside the dialog with mutually exclusive toggles; empty registry onboarding renders directly in the dialog with large primary buttons for `Add project folder…` / `Add project path…` / `Add project from Git…` / `Use default directory`. The dialog closes on successful registration/clone and selects the returned main space; on failure the current project is unchanged. Main spaces without a custom display name render as `主空间` while keeping `spaceId: "main"`; the selected space header subtitle shows `空间：...` plus the current Git branch or WorkTree branch/base status, appends path-missing state when needed, and keeps full path/status details in the hover/focus tooltip. WorkTree badges remain compact (`WT` plus branch) with a tooltip for branch and base/unknown state. Session, Studio child, hover-action, delete-confirmation, and archived rows keep title/metadata content on single non-wrapping lines and ellipsize long text at narrow sidebar widths. **WorkTree archive/delete flow:** `confirmWorktreeAction()` optimistically merges the API response's `archivedSpaces` into local project state so the worktree space disappears immediately, then refreshes projects in the background. If the currently-selected space was the archived/deleted one, fallback preference is: (1) `main` space of the same project, (2) any other active non-missing space in that project, (3) API-provided `fallbackCwd`, (4) null. Deleted session ids are forwarded via `onSessionDeleted`. The sidebar **centralizes project and space context menu state** through `ProjectSpaceContextMenuState` (targeting a specific project or project+space pair). Context menu callbacks (`handleDialogProjectContextMenu`, `handleDialogSpaceContextMenu`) bridge dialog right-click events into the sidebar state so that edit/star/archive/WorkTree-delete actions operate on the right-clicked target, not just the currently selected workspace. **Space drag-reorder** is handled by `handleReorderSpaces` which optimistically updates local state and calls `PATCH /api/projects/[projectId]/spaces`, rolling back to pre-drag project state on failure. **Top workspace menu and metadata dialog** labels have been unified to "星标/取消星标" for both projects and spaces; the metadata dialog distinguishes the two with contextual hints ("星标项目优先排序" for projects vs "仅用于标记，不影响空间排序" for spaces). |
| `components/ProjectSpaceSwitchDialog.tsx` | Viewport-level modal dialog (`role="dialog"`, `aria-modal="true"`) for layered project/space switching. Receives all state and callbacks as props from `SessionSidebar`. Left pane: search box, add-project toolbar (`Add project folder…`, `Add path…`, `From Git…`), scrollable sorted project list with pinned markers, current-selection highlight, space counts, and path ellipsis. Right pane: selected project header with root path, scrollable space list with Main/WT type badges, branch/base/path metadata, `路径缺失` disabled state, current-selection checkmark, hover highlighting, and right-click context menus on every card/row. **All project cards and all space rows (main + WorkTree) now support right-click context menus** via `onProjectContextMenu` / `onSpaceContextMenu` callbacks — the dialog fires these events and `SessionSidebar` owns the action state, so users can edit, star, archive, or delete any project/space without switching to it first. **Non-main spaces display a drag handle (`⋮⋮`)** and support HTML5 drag-and-drop reordering; the dialog manages local drag state (`dragId`/`dropTargetId`) with dashed-border drag affordance and calls `onReorderSpaces` on drop to persist the new order. Pinned projects and spaces show a visible `★` badge. Includes mutually exclusive inline add-project forms Includes mutually exclusive inline add-project forms (manual path with `Enter`/`Escape` handling, Git clone with parent directory picker + remote URL) that render under the toolbar when toggled. **Empty registry onboarding:** when `activeProjects.length === 0`, the right pane shows a centered onboarding card with large primary buttons for all four add-project paths, plus inline forms below the buttons. Supports keyboard navigation (focus trap, `Esc` close with clone-busy guard, `Tab`/`Shift+Tab` cycling), backdrop click close, focus restoration to trigger button on close, auto-focus search on open, and responsive max-width/max-height clamped to viewport with independent scroll areas. Uses project style CSS variables and `sortProjectsForSidebar`/`activeProjectSpaces`/`displayProjectName`/`displaySpaceName`/`shortenCwd`/`worktreeInfoFromSpace` helpers. |
| `components/Checkbox.tsx` | Shared theme-aware checkbox control with custom focus, hover, checked visuals, optional label text, and native input semantics. |
| `components/ChatWindow.tsx` | Message list, SSE streaming, fork/navigate logic. Shows archived banner and disables input for archived sessions, treats opened YPI Studio child sessions as read-only audit views, while `useAgentSession` can follow their read-only audit SSE and reload the child JSONL when `studio_child_audit_changed` arrives. It wires the effective session id and optional project/space context for precreated empty sessions into chat input controls, forwards `SessionUsageTopbarStats` from `useAgentSession` to `AppShell` with a `statsKey` that includes `selectedSessionKind`, `parentFound`, own/studio-child token totals, `selectedSessionTotals`, and `parentRollupTotals` cost so switching between a parent and its Studio child audit tab refreshes the top bar even when rollup totals match, reports Studio tool signatures from `ypi_studio_subagent` / `ypi_studio_wait` / `ypi_studio_task` so `AppShell` can refresh the sidebar when child sessions or run statuses change, and reports compact YPI Studio tool live-progress overlays, including created/bound task ids/keys, `run.id ?? run.runId` fallback, task/subtask titles, phase/tokens/tps/current tool, recent preview changes, and display-limit flags, to `AppShell` for the session widget. Global Studio background/waiting state is shown by the floating `YpiStudioSessionWidget`, not a fixed card inside the chat scroll. Passes `opencodeGoFailoverNotice` from the hook to `ChatInput` for lightweight in-chat failover feedback. |
| `components/ChatInput.tsx` | Input bar, model dropdown, thinking level, tool preset, image upload, Browser Share binding entry, file-reference chips, slash-command autocomplete for extension commands/skills/prompt templates, and serialized Trellis task context blocks. The shared model dropdown keeps `provider/modelId` values unchanged while searching by model, provider id, and provider display name. New empty sessions receive the default tool preset and thinking level from `pi-web.json` (`yolk.defaultToolPreset`, `yolk.defaultThinkingLevel`) and can still be changed per session from the compact dropdowns; Browser Share can request a draft session before the first prompt; default/full/subagent presets include the built-in YPI Studio task tool, and the subagent preset also includes Studio member delegation. |
| `components/BrowserShareControl.tsx` | Chat-input Browser Share control that binds a Chrome extension share code to the current effective session. In New Chat it is enabled when a `cwd` is available and can lazily request an empty session before binding; it validates share-code shape before creating that session, explains the first-message Browser Share behavior, displays lifecycle, tab title/url/origin, source service URL, current chat/session operator, permission/auto-allowed/approval-required scope, capture mode, persistent debugger status and unavailable warnings, screenshot availability, snapshot and best-effort connection/heartbeat state, renders pending approval cards plus compatible queued/running/recent command projections when present, polls faster while active commands exist, and unbinds the current share so the extension receives a detach tombstone. |
| `components/ModelSelect.tsx` | Shared searchable model selector used by chat and settings model policy fields, with grouped options and fuzzy jump/subsequence search across model labels, provider ids, and provider display names. |
| `components/SelectDropdown.tsx` | Shared non-search dropdown used by compact chat controls and settings fields such as thinking-level selectors. |
| `components/ChatGptUsagePanel.tsx` | Optional semi-transparent top-bar ChatGPT/Codex quota panel; reads and periodically revalidates cached active-account usage and reset-credit availability, reloads accounts on expand, lists saved accounts with quick activation, supports manual quota refresh and confirmed reset-credit consumption for the active account, and shows backend auto-refresh scheduler/lock maintenance state. |
| `components/ChatGptWarmupDialog.tsx` | ChatGPT/Codex warmup management dialog opened from the saved-account management area; supports manual multi-select warmup, scheduled warmup account/time settings, and recent manual/scheduled run history. |
| `components/MessageView.tsx` | Render user, assistant, tool-call, and tool-result messages; routes `ypi_studio_subagent` and `ypi_studio_wait` tool calls to Studio-specific renderers while generic tools keep the compact JSON/result renderer. |
| `components/YpiStudioSubagentTranscript.tsx` | Recent-status-first renderer for YPI Studio member delegation tool calls. It accepts lightweight async-start results by normalizing `run.id ?? run.runId`, filling task identity from `details.task`, and showing `subtaskTitle ?? taskTitle ?? taskId` when transcript metadata or progress previews are absent. It keeps the title/status focused on member, run status, task/subtask title, phase/current action, elapsed time, and visible `t/s`; the default expanded view shows only a bounded recent activity window plus neutral display notes when available. New SDK runs can show child session id/file and request-affinity diagnostics when those optional fields are present; lightweight async-start cards degrade to title/status/model/thinking/runId display and rely on `ypi_studio_wait` for progress. Delegated prompts, tool inputs/results, full transcript rows, and raw JSON stay behind debug/raw toggles. Display/transcript/API clipping is informational and never by itself means the child run failed; failure styling follows run status or hard termination. |
| `components/YpiStudioWaitPanel.tsx` | Rich renderer for `ypi_studio_wait` tool calls. It turns minimal wait progress/final details into a default-expanded Studio wait panel with per-run cards, `id`/`runId` compatibility, task/subtask titles, member/status/phase/current-tool chips, live `t/s` speed badges, active/done/total counts, timeout/still-running guidance, and raw debug behind a toggle so parallel waits no longer look like a stalled JSON-only tool call. Wait tool payloads intentionally omit full task documents, events, transcripts, child-session diagnostics, and transcript previews because the panel only needs the compact runtime projection. |
| `components/ModelsConfig.tsx` → `ApiKeyAccountsDetail` | Sub-component within `ModelsConfig` rendered when a provider has `authMode === "managed_accounts"` (v1: only opencode-go). Provides full multi-account API-key management in the settings modal: account list sorted with active-first, ACTIVE/Imported/DISABLED badges, disabled reason display with system/user source, masked key preview by default, per-account reveal (eye toggle) + copy with toast feedback, activate button (disabled for disabled accounts with tooltip), Enable/Disable actions with disable confirmation modal that requires replacement selection or explicit active-clear for active accounts, Edit dialog (display name, description, optional key replacement), Delete with contextual confirmation dialog (active fallback vs last-account disconnect), add-key form with optional auto-activate, legacy-import informational banner, error banner, and green/grey configured status indicator. All plaintext is discarded on provider switch / modal close / refresh; copied keys go to clipboard only on explicit user action. |
| `components/BranchNavigator.tsx` | In-session branch switcher. |
| `components/ChatMinimap.tsx` | Scroll minimap beside message list. |
| `components/ToolPanel.tsx` | Tool presets and preset inference helpers, including YPI Studio task/delegation tools and Browser Share read/action tools in the appropriate presets so implicit workflow routing can create tasks, dispatch members, and inspect a bound Chrome page. |
| `components/ModelsConfig.tsx` | Modal for editing `models.json`, OAuth/API-key auth, and ChatGPT Plus/Pro saved-account add/import, activation, temporary account selection fo…
